nodes.label: 原始多智能体方案
nodes.source_file: background_and_knowledge_raw/老年照护多智能体系统方案.md

nodes.label: CareMind 项目
nodes.rationale: The repository centers on a multi-agent elderly care decision-support project.

nodes.label: 多智能体协同
nodes.rationale: The system is intentionally decomposed into specialized agents with an orchestrator rather than one monolithic model.

nodes.label: Agent 1 分诊评估
nodes.rationale: Risk-first triage is designed as the front door for escalation and downstream coordination.

nodes.label: Agent 2 用药安全
nodes.rationale: Medication conflict detection is treated as a life-safety critical capability and requires audited knowledge sources.

nodes.label: Agent 3 家属沟通
nodes.rationale: Narrative reporting exists to reduce family black-box anxiety and translate care status into understandable language.

nodes.label: 调度器
nodes.rationale: The orchestrator mediates shared memory and agent conflict resolution across the system.

nodes.label: 个性化生成
nodes.rationale: Personalization is scoped to cognition, language, relationship role, and time-series memory rather than unconstrained customization.

nodes.label: 知识库
nodes.rationale: The system relies on curated guideline and policy sources rather than open web retrieval.

nodes.label: 行业痛点
nodes.rationale: The project is justified by staffing shortages, payment limits, quality issues, and fragmented care coordination.

nodes.label: 老龄政策背景
nodes.rationale: Policy and demographic context anchor the project in national aging and silver-economy priorities.

nodes.label: 医养结合
nodes.rationale: CareMind is framed as a digital bridge across the medical-civil affairs divide.

nodes.label: 长期护理保险
nodes.rationale: Disability assessment and care design are explicitly aligned with long-term care insurance policy language.

nodes.label: 实施计划
nodes.rationale: The project is staged across design, development, integration, and defense milestones.

nodes.label: 团队交付模式
nodes.rationale: Four members own separate agent and delivery tracks with milestone-based acceptance criteria.

nodes.label: 文档治理
nodes.rationale: The repository treats system-design and governance documents as the single source of truth for planning-stage changes.

nodes.label: 工具上手
nodes.rationale: The helper guides exist to lower the setup barrier for new contributors.

nodes.label: 安全边界
nodes.rationale: The system is positioned as assistive rather than diagnostic, with strict knowledge quality and wording constraints.

nodes.label: 评估风险
nodes.rationale: The evaluation document highlights maturity gaps, metric ambiguity, stale facts, and duplicate-maintenance risk.
